mapper.select:
SELECT a.id, a.article_title, c.category_name, a.article_summary, a.article_status, a.publish_time FROM tb_article a LEFT JOIN tb_category c ON a.category_id = c.id AND c.is_delete = 0 WHERE a.is_delete = 0
AND a.article_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{articleTitle}, '%')
AND a.category_id = #{categoryId}
AND a.id IN ( SELECT atr2.article_id FROM tb_article_tag_relation atr2 WHERE atr2.tag_id = #{tagId} AND atr2.is_delete = 0 )
ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
SELECT t.tag_name FROM tb_article_tag_relation atr JOIN tb_tag t ON atr.tag_id = t.id AND t.is_delete = 0 WHERE atr.article_id = #{id} AND atr.is_delete = 0
